# anthropic_compliance_activities (Data Source)

Reads the Compliance Activity Feed. Enterprise + Compliance API key (scope `read:compliance_activities`). All filters are optional; unset filters return the full window. Provider paginates until exhausted — the entire result set is materialized in state, so bound the window via `starting_at`/`ending_at` for busy orgs.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Requires provider.compliance_api_key (sk-ant-api01-...) OR
# ANTHROPIC_COMPLIANCE_API_KEY env var. Enterprise-only.

data "anthropic_compliance_activities" "recent_admin" {
  starting_at   = "2026-07-01T00:00:00Z"
  ending_at     = "2026-07-31T23:59:59Z"
  resource_type = "workspace"
}

output "admin_actions_july" {
  value = data.anthropic_compliance_activities.recent_admin.activities
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `action` (String) Filter by action string (e.g. `workspace.update`).
- `actor_id` (String) Filter by actor (user_id / service_account_id).
- `ending_at` (String) RFC3339 upper bound (exclusive).
- `limit` (Number) Per-page size (default 100, max per Anthropic). Total result set is not capped by this.
- `resource_type` (String) Filter by resource type.
- `starting_at` (String) RFC3339 lower bound (inclusive).

### Read-Only

- `activities` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--activities))

<a id="nestedatt--activities"></a>
### Nested Schema for `activities`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String)
- `actor_email` (String)
- `actor_id` (String)
- `actor_type` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `outcome` (String)
- `resource_id` (String)
- `resource_type` (String)
- `timestamp` (String)
